mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND (p.category_id = #{categoryId} OR p.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{categoryId})) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = 1

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND (p.category_id = #{categoryId} OR p.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{categoryId})) ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product p WHERE p.status = 1 AND (p.category_id = #{categoryId} OR p.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{categoryId}))

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = 1 AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND (p.category_id = #{categoryId} OR p.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{categoryId}))
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, stock, image, category_id, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{image}, #{categoryId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, sales = sales + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id ORDER BY p.sales DESC LIMIT #{limit}
